title: Éducation sentimentale
writer: Gustave Flaubert, Roland Laudenbach, Roger Nimier
actors: Jean-Claude Brialy, Marie-José Nat, Dawn Addams
plot: Frédéric, a shy small-town man, falls in love with Anne, a middle class woman married to Didier, who cheats on her with top model Barbara. Catherine, a very determined woman, is secretly in love with Frédéric and in order to keep ...
